items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. Price target $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing. Grid energy storage is a very interesting demand driver.

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC raised price target to $257. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027, market likely to remain balanced to under-supplied through 2050.
